subcodes.first_line: O Ja'far! The Lord of Destiny, Who hath been imprisoned in this land, maketh mention of thee, inasmuch as He hath summoned all unto God, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا جعفر یذکرک مالک القدر الذی حبس فی هذه الارض بما دعا الکل الی الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment
